global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text elements promoting a travel offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a special offer.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: NomadLaye logo
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text reading 'NomadLaye' in a large font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' in a large, white font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Destinations await
elements.description: The phrase 'destinations await' in a prominent, white font, located just below the 'Dream' text.

elements.label: Hotels + flights
elements.description: The text 'Hotels + flights in one tap' in a smaller white font, positioned below 'destinations await'.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A bold, white '$4.99' text displayed at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, solid circle in a lighter shade of orange, positioned near the top left.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small, abstract shape located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Middle decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a lighter shade of orange, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Offer details
elements.description: Text detailing the offer, 'Hotels + flights in one tap', in a smaller font at the bottom.
elements.text_content: destinations await Hotels + flights in one tap $4.99 Get offer

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape at the top of the ad, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' in a large, white font, centered in the middle of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
